raw_text:
For each, output exactly one line in the format:
  LABEL :: CHECKED
  LABEL :: UNCHECKED
Where LABEL is the text next to the checkbox and the state is whether the box appears filled. Output nothing else — no preamble, no Markdown, no commentary. If there are no checkboxes, output the single line: NO_CHECKBOXES_FOUND
